texts:
PREGUNTAS:
1. How does the flexible remuneration plan specifically impact the net salary of an employee, and are there any scenarios where an employee might end up with a lower net salary even after participating in the plan?
   
2. What procedures or protocols are in place if an employee does not receive the welcome and registration instructions for the EDENRED platform, and what is the expected timeline for resolving such issues?

3. Could you provide a detailed explanation of how the tax exemptions for remuneration in kind (such as health insurance, restaurant card, and transport card) are calculated, and are there any caps or limitations on these exemptions beyond what is stated in the text?
---
FAQ's
FLEXIBLE RETRIBUTION PLAN
Our employees can now personalize their salary payment according to their individual situation and can benefit from tax advantages for contracting 
services like the following:
Medical Insurance
Restaurant Card
Public Transport Card
Childcare
Training
With the same gross salary, less IPRF (Personal Income Tax) is paid, and a higher net salary is available.
What is flexible remuneration?
It is a system of remuneration that allows the employee to distribute the payment of his or her salary:
• A part in CASH, as always, in money. Everything received in cash is taxed by IRPF (Personal Income Tax).
• Another part in PRODUCTS and SERVICES offered by the company. Some products and services are not taxed when they are paid through the 
payroll because as they are considered as remuneration in kind, they are not subject to taxation, so they are exempt from IRPF (Personal Income 
Tax).
How does flexible remuneration work?
1. The employee chooses the products/services he/she wants to purchase, usually products that he/she is already paying with his/her net salary as a 
regular expense.
2. The company pays for the services purchased by the employee.
3. The employee enjoys the services purchased, depending on his or her personal/family needs, while at the same time increasing his or her available 
salary.
Which products have tax advantages?
•Health insurance. In addition to the tax exemption, you benefit from an excellent price if you contract it through the company policy.
• Edenred Restaurant Card. You can get €11 per working day.
• Edenred Transport Card. You pay for or top up a ticket or a metro/train/tram/bus card. Up to €1,500 per year.
• Childcare. You can pay the monthly childcare fees for your children (from 0 to 3 years old). No amount limits.
How can I benefit from the flexible remuneration plan?
The access is through the platform the EDENRED provided us. You will receive or have already received the welcome and registration instructions in 
your mailbox. If not, please ask for them to HR.
What are the advantages of the flexible remuneration plan?
 Take advantage of the tax benefits (Personal Income Tax exemption, IRPF) that each product and service have by becoming remuneration in kind 
(the company pays it on behalf of the employee and deducts it from the payroll).
 Employee decides which products to include each month.
What benefit does the company derive from the flexible remuneration plan?

PREGUNTAS:
1. In the context of flexible remuneration, how does opting for remuneration in kind impact my Personal Income Tax (IRPF) compared to my regular salary pay, and what are the implications of this change in the short and long term?

2. Considering the accumulation feature of the balance for the Restaurant Card and Transport Card, how could an employee strategically manage these balances to maximize their overall benefit and purchasing power throughout the year?

3. What are the potential benefits and drawbacks of participating in the flexible pay system concerning social security contributions, and how do these influence the long-term financial security of an employee?
---
Increase the purchasing power of employees.
 Retaining talent, adapting to the needs and personal circumstances of each employee.
 Improve the company's brand by offering a system that is valued and recognized against the competition.
 Increase productivity by motivating employees.
 To make this company a good place to work, following our policy of continuous improvement.
Does my salary change?
The employee's salary is the same as before flexible pay, the total salary would NOT VARY. You simply decide what part you want to receive in cash 
and what part you want to receive in kind.
Is there a "maximum" amount of my salary that I can flex?
The legal maximum for remuneration in kind under the employee's statute is 30% of the total remuneration
Do I still pay Social Security contributions?
All your salary, cash and in kind pay social security contributions in exactly the same way. The contribution base does not change. It is the Personal 
Income Tax (IRPF) that is reduced so the savings for the employee come from this part.
How do I have to report it to the tax authorities in my tax return?
You don't have to do anything different from other years. It is the company that informs the tax authorities of your remuneration each year, which is 
then reflected in your tax data and/or in your draft income tax return.
Do I have to change my contract?
The contract is not modified. The employee who is interested in the flexible remuneration plan has to sign an annex that is available within the 
Platform, by which the employee expresses his/her willingness to change his/her remuneration model and that, when he/she wishes, he/she can 
choose to receive part of his/her salary in the form of remuneration in kind.
At which establishments can I use the Restaurant Card?
In all physical or online establishments that have a catering POS (basically bars, restaurants and take-away food outlets). They do not need to be 
affiliated to any specific chain (such as Ticket Restaurant or similar).
Do I lose the money I don't spend in a month?
In both the Restaurant Card and the Transport Card, the balance can be accumulated, it is not lost.
Can I pay for airline tickets with the Transport Card?
With the Transport Card you can pay for tickets and season tickets for any public transport you use to get to work (bus, metro, train, Ave, tram...). It is 
not possible to pay for airline tickets.
Can I choose any childcare center?
Yes, you can select any nursery that is authorized to teach the first cycle of infant education. You only have to indicate it on the platform.

PREGUNTAS:
1. How can an ex-employee negotiate the continuation of their health insurance after terminating their contract with the company?
2. Is there any cost associated with the health insurance plan for employees or their immediate family members?
3. What steps should an employee follow to address queries regarding the health insurance provided in the Flexible Remuneration Plan?
---
Who can register for health insurance?
All employees and immediate family members (spouse and children).
What is included in the health insurance, what is the medical list?
You can find all the information you need on the link above (Medical Insurance).
What happens to the health insurance if I terminate my contract with the company?
The insurance is terminated. The insurer may negotiate with each ex-employee the conditions for continuing the health insurance if you wish to do so. 
There is no commitment of continuity.
How much does it cost to participate in the Plan?
No cost for the employee.
Who do I contact if I have questions?
The Flexible Remuneration Plan is managed by the consultancy Edenred.
